title: Use phx-throttle on a rapid-fire button
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/like_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.LikeLive) that renders <button phx-click="like" phx-throttle="1000">Like</button> and has a handle_event("like", _params, socket) that increments the @likes assign. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, :likes, 0)}.
tier_rationale: Canonical throttle attribute for a rapid-fire button.
